gist.headline: A touch of magic
gist.blurb: A new community app has sprouted! MageAI Generator is now live in the greenhouse, letting you conjure up images and videos with Pollinations AI.
gist.summary: Added MageAI Generator to the community app showcase, providing a new interface for creating images and videos.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use MageAI Generator directly from our community directory.
gist.visual_concept: MageAI implies magic and wizardry. Depict Polly the bee as a tiny wizard (with a hat and wand) conjuring images out of a glowing crystal ball or spellbook, representing the new MageAI Generator app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny purple wizard hat, waving a glowing wand over a magical crystal ball that displays a tiny pixelated landscape. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny purple wizard hat, waving a glowing wand over a magical crystal ball that displays a tiny pixelated landscape.
